# Pure Python Math

Inline fraction: $\frac{a}{b}$.

Inline radical: $\sqrt[n]{x}$.

Scripts: $x^{2}$ and $x_{i}$.

Greek text: $\alpha + \beta = \gamma$.

N-ary operators: $\sum_{i=0}^{n}$ and $\int_{0}^{1}$.

$$
\frac{-b + \sqrt{b^{2}-4ac}}{2a}
$$

Unsupported stays literal: $\notacommand{x}$.

Inline code stays literal: `$x^{2}$`.

```text
$\frac{code}{only}$
```
